data.title: Charlotte's Web Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Financial Results
data.description: Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. is poised for growth and profitability due to its expected involvement in the CMMI Medicare Pilot Program. The company's advances in regulatory approval and cost efficiency enhancements have positioned it for success. As of March 31, 2026, the company's stock is listed as TSX: CWEB and OTC: CWBHF.

data.title: PowerBank Shares Update on Pennsylvania Project Interconnection
data.description: In Toronto, a pioneering Community Solar project is anticipated to be one of the initial projects of its kind in the state. Scheduled for launch on March 31, 2026, PowerBank Corporation (NASDAQ: SUUN) (Cboe CA: SUNN) (FSE: 103), a prominent North American energy infrastructure developer, is spearheading this initiative. This project marks a significant milestone in renewable energy development, targeting a large-scale deployment to benefit the local community.

data.title: Introducing Staking on GalaxyOne
data.description: Galaxy Digital Inc. (Nasdaq: GLXY) unveiled an exciting update on March 31, 2026, announcing the expansion of GalaxyOne's digital asset capabilities for individual investors in the United States. GalaxyOne, a financial technology platform created by Galaxy, now provides enhanced tools for U.S. investors to efficiently manage their digital assets. This development signifies the company's commitment to catering to the needs of individual investors by offering increased features and functionalities on their platform.

data.title: JPMorganChase Launches American Dream Initiative to Expand Local Economic Opportunity
data.description: JPMorganChase revealed today its launch of the American Dream Initiative (ADI), a long-term program aimed at enhancing opportunities for millions of Americans and upcoming generations by making focused investments in communities nationwide. With a history of promoting effective local strategies, the company plans to boost financial support for successful programs that improve economic participation, particularly in assisting individuals in establishing and expanding small businesses. This initiative seeks to make a meaningful impact by directing resources towards initiatives that support economic inclusion and growth across the country.

data.title: Coral Secures Additional $4M to Close Canada’s $37B Women’s Health Gap
data.description: Coral Health, a virtual clinic for midlife women based in Montreal, has recently secured a $4 million CAD acceleration round. This funding will further support the growth and development of the company as it continues to redefine the category.

data.title: Deloitte announces sale of Auvenir, an internal venture and accountech software provider, to Auvenir Management
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Toronto and New York, Deloitte finalized the sale of Auvenir to its management team, which has since re-branded the company as Streamworks Tech. The company is known for its cloud-native accountech and compliance platforms. The re-branded Streamworks Tech has launched AI-powered workflow and engagement solutions for businesses. This move marks an important transition for the company in the tech industry.
Earnings Scheduled For March 31, 2026

data.title: GetVocal Introduces Control Center to Help Enterprises Scale AI Across 90 Percent Plus of Customer Conversations
data.description: In Paris, GetVocal, a top European provider of conversational AI agents for enterprise customer support, has unveiled its Control Center. This interface combines human oversight with AI operations to aid businesses in expanding customer experience (CX) automation while upholding trust, compliance, and human involvement. As companies elevate AI use from basic to intricate customer interactions, they encounter a dual operational hurdle: relying solely on AI heightens risks, yet excessive human intervention can impede scalability. GetVocal's Control Center aims to strike a balance in this regard.

data.title: Aeva CityOS Selected for Large-Scale Deployment in Georgia
data.description: Aeva, a leading provider of advanced sensing and perception systems, revealed that the Georgia Department of Transportation (GDOT) has opted for Aeva CityOS™ ITS platform for deployment at 30 additional intersections in various locations within the larger Atlanta region. This move signifies a substantial advancement in expanding AI-driven intelligent infrastructure utilizing Aeva's 4D LiDAR technology. This selection demonstrates the growing adoption of innovative technologies in enhancing transportation systems for improved efficiency and safety.

data.title: Eptura Advances Enterprise Workplace Coordination in Microsoft 365 Following Solutions Partner with Certified Software Designation for Financial Services AI
data.description: Atlanta-based company Eptura recently shared updates regarding the ongoing progress of integrating their software, Eptura Engage, with Microsoft 365.

data.title: MRI-Simmons and NIQ Join Proximic by Comscore’s Data Partner Network to Deliver Scalable, Privacy-Centric Audience Solutions
data.description: In New York, NIQ-owned MRI-Simmons, a top consumer insights and advertising solutions provider, and NIQ (NYSE: NIQ), a consumer intelligence company, have partnered with Comscore's Data Partner Network. This initiative helps data providers convert ID-based datasets into scalable, privacy-focused contextual audiences using Proximic's predictive technology. Proximic by Comscore has launched this new service, aiming to enhance audience targeting capabilities through data transformation.

data.title: iBase-t Announces Strategic Growth Investment from TA to Accelerate AI-Powered Digital Manufacturing and MRO Transformation in Aerospace & Defense
data.description: Aerospace and defense manufacturer software company iBase-t has secured a strategic growth investment from TA Associates, a global growth private equity firm. The investment aims to bolster iBase-t's product innovation and global expansion efforts as the aerospace and defense industries see increased production scaling. The investment will specifically aid in the modernization of sustainment operations and the hastened adoption of artificial intelligence technologies.

data.title: TD SYNNEX Reports Record Fiscal 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX) released their financial results for the fiscal first quarter ending February 28, 2026. Key highlights include a revenue increase of 18.1% to $17.161 billion compared to $14.532 billion in the same quarter last year. Gross profit also rose by 25.5% to $1.252 billion from $998 million, with a gross margin increase to 7.30% from 6.87%. Operating income for the quarter was $489 million.

data.title: Scala Biodesign Raises $16M Series A Financing to Accelerate Development of Protein-Based Products with ScalaOS
data.description: An Israeli company, Scala Biodesign, has recently secured $16 million in Series A financing to expedite the advancement of protein-based products utilizing ScalaOS technology. This funding will bolster efforts toward innovation and growth within the field of biodesign.

data.title: AI Med Consult and 4D EMR Announce Strategic Partnership to Advance AI-Driven Patient Engagement and Practice Efficiency
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, AI Med Consult and 4th Dimension EMR have revealed a significant partnership at the American Academy of Cosmetic Surgery (AACS) Annual Scientific Meeting. This collaboration aims to enhance patient engagement, operational efficiency, and data-informed decision-making for aesthetic and cosmetic medical practices. The partnership merges AI Med Consult's AI-driven patient engagement technology with 4D EMR's advanced electronic medical record system. This alliance is expected to revolutionize the industry by combining cutting-edge technology and expertise.

data.title: Softr Unveils an AI-Native Platform, Ushering in a New Era of Business Software Creation Without Code
data.description: In Berlin, Softr has transitioned into an AI-native platform, ushering the era of production-ready business software accessible to non-technical teams. This advancement signifies the end of AI prototypes as the company introduces its AI Co-Builder tool. This innovation allows teams to create secure, fully operational business applications without code, effectively replacing spreadsheets and manual processes. Softr's new offering empowers users to construct internal tools, customer portals, and partner platforms effortlessly.

data.title: Quanta Services to Host & Webcast its 2026 Investor Day
data.description: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) has scheduled its 2026 Investor Day in New York City on March 31, 2026. During this event, the company will provide a strategic update along with its long-term financial targets. Management will present their plans and goals to investors and analysts. This information will be shared via a webcast as part of the event, emphasizing transparency and communication with stakeholders.

data.title: Palo Alto CEO Nikesh Arora Warns OpenAI, Anthropic Models Could Boost Cyberattacks Within Six Months— 'The Stakes Are High...'
data.description: AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic are expected to release advanced models capable of identifying software vulnerabilities on a large scale within six months, posing a heightened risk of sophisticated cyberattacks, as warned by Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora. These AI models will soon be accessible to anyone with a credit card and a computer, making it easier for even individual malicious actors to conduct campaigns that previously required teams. Arora noted that companies' heavy reliance on multiple vendors and outdated open-source systems creates a vast attack surface, with new AI models becoming increasingly proficient at identifying overlooked vulnerabilities. These AI-powered attacks could transition from breach to data theft in just 25 minutes, contrasting with most firms taking days to detect intrusions. This development underscores the pressing need for organizations to bolster their cybersecurity measures.
